items.title: An Introduction to Variable and Feature Selection (Guyon & Elisseeff)
items.author: Isabelle Guyon, André Elisseeff
items.note: Foundational survey of filter, wrapper, and embedded methods including RFE.

items.title: Regression Shrinkage and Selection via the Lasso (Tibshirani, 1996)
items.author: Robert Tibshirani
items.note: Original L1 sparsity paper linking penalized regression to subset selection.

items.title: scikit-learn Feature selection documentation
items.author: scikit-learn developers
items.note: API reference for SelectKBest, mutual information, RFE, RFECV, and pipelines.
